title: Verilator truncates statement incorrectly for pattern assignments

features.name: packed struct with multiple logic bitfield members
features.description: Code should include a packed struct definition with multiple logic bitfield members of equal width

features.name: pattern assignment to packed struct via assign
features.description: Code should include a pattern assignment to a packed struct using assign statement and '{}

features.name: arithmetic expressions in struct pattern field values
features.description: Code should include arithmetic expressions (modulo and division) used as field values in a struct pattern assignment
